TED WINCHESTER W/PET. ANDREA PALASH W/RESP. THIS CASE IS CONSOLIDATED UNDER FDV-02-800395 AND THAT SHALL BE THE NUMBER USED HENCEFORTH. AFTER ARGUMENT AND SUBMISSION, THE COURT ORDERS: PET REQUEST FOR RO AGAINST RESP IS DENIED BASED ON THE FACT THAT THE ONLY PERSON HE EVER THREATENED TO HARM WAS RESP HIMSELF AND THE ONLY PERSON DOING ANY HARRASSING WAS THE PET. PET TO STAY AWAY FROM THE SKATEBOARD RINK IF THE RESP IS THERE. RESP REQUEST FOR A/F IS DENIED.

PET TO STAY AWAY FROM THE SKATEBOARD RINK IF THE RESP IS THERE. RESP REQUEST FOR A/F IS DENIED.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE- MARJORIE A. SLABACH
